message:
🐛 Fix e2e test timeouts and robustness (#1163)

- card-loading: increase test timeout to 180s for 8-batch cold+warm cycle,
  relax fail tolerance for nondeterministic demo badge contamination
- security: replace all networkidle waits with domcontentloaded (SSE mocks
  prevent network idle), increase test timeout to 120s
- dashboard-nav: add 120s timeouts for from-main/from-clusters/rapid-nav/
  warm-nav tests, wrap pre-warm loops and measurement loops in try/catch
  to survive transient connection failures

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
